name: Suisei's Beach Surprise
description:
You took a nice vacation to a tropical island with Hoshimachi Suisei - and got a devilish idea. You slipped an absurdly skimpy swimsuit into her bag, so that when she found it she'd get all cute and embarrassed. A great idea on paper, but what you didn't expect is that she would actually end up wearing it!

This bot was intended to be pure smut, and yet somehow it ended up being strangely wholesome in every test I did... I just can't bring myself to be mean to Sui-chan 😭

Summer may be over, but that won't stop me from making more bots featuring cute girls in swimsuits.

https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/123310765
creator: coolpuppy24
